title: Yahoo Finance test drives Mercedes-Benz's new luxury EV, the CLA 250+
summary: Mercedes-Benz (MBG.DE, MBGAF) is shifting into high gear with a new luxury EV designed to better compete with Tesla's (TSLA) Model 3. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian comes on Market Domination Overtime to discuss his test driving of the new CLA 250+ electric sedan.

title: Waymo wears out its welcome in major U.S. city as mayor responds
summary: Roadways in U.S. cities are gripped by gridlock, unsafe drivers, and too many vehicles, so most municipalities readily welcome any solution that could alleviate those issues. Autonomous driving companies see a future where roads are less congested and far safer, thanks to technology that takes ...

title: Tesla and Alphabet Earnings: The Metrics That Matter Most
summary: A duo of Magnificent 7 members, namely Tesla (TSLA) and Alphabet (GOOGL), will help headline the reporting docket this week, who both head into their reports with favorable revisions for both earnings and sales.

title: SpaceX Aborts Starship Test Flight 13 After Engine Failure, Completes SDA Mission
summary: SpaceX on Thursday aborted the 13th test flight for its Starship rocket after some engines failed to ignite. SPCX stock fell.

title: TSLA Stock Slips — Investors Await Tesla’s Q2 Earnings And Semi Progress
summary: Tesla said in a post on X on Friday that it has opened a new public Megacharger station in Bloomington, California, marking what the company’s team described as “the beginning of the Megacharger network.”
